
```{ojs}
makeIsotype = function({
  inputData,
  shapeDomain = ["Lebensmittel", "Wohnen", "Energie", "Mobilität", "Güter", "Dienstleistungen"],
  shapeRange = [path1, path2, path3, path4, path5, path6],
  shapeRangeHalf = [path1_half, path2_half, path3_half, path4_half, path5_half, path6_half],
  colorRange = colors_burger,
  xDomain = [0, 14],
  height = 250,
  size = 5,
  unit = "€",
  divisor = 1000,
  minExtent = 100,
  spacing = -10,
  plotWidth = null,
  textShift = 36,
  showFacetHeader = true
}) {

  return vl.layer(
    // Combined shapes layer with conditional shape selection
    vl.markPoint({
      size: size,
      stroke: "black",
      strokeOpacity: 1,
      strokeWidth: 1,
      opacity: 1,
      clip: false,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("name")
        .sort(shapeDomain)
        .axis({
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          title: null,
          labelOffset: 14,
          minExtent: minExtent,
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("positions")
        .scale({
          domain: xDomain,
          nice: false,
          zero: false,
        })
        .axis({
          title: null,
          labels: false,
          ticks: false,
          domain: false,
          grid: false,
        }),
      vl.fill()
        .fieldN("name")
        .scale({
          range: colorRange,
        })
        .legend(false),
      vl.shape()
        .fieldN("shapeKey")
        .scale({
          domain: shapeDomain.concat(shapeDomain.map(d => d + "_half")),
          range: shapeRange.concat(shapeRangeHalf)
        })
        .legend(false)
    ),
    vl.markText({
      align: "left",
      dx: textShift,
      dy: 14,
      fontSize: 12,
      clip: false
    })
    .transform(
      vl.filter(`datum.positions === datum.totalShapes - 1`),
      vl.calculate(`format(datum.value, ',') + ' ${unit}'`).as("valueWithUnit")
    )
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("name")
        .sort(shapeDomain),
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("positions"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldN("valueWithUnit"),
    )
  )
  .transform(
    vl.calculate(`datum.value / ${divisor}`).as("exactValue"),
    vl.calculate(`floor(datum.exactValue)`).as("fullShapes"),
    vl.calculate(`datum.exactValue - datum.fullShapes`).as("decimal"),
    vl.calculate(`datum.decimal >= 0.3 && datum.decimal <= 0.7 ? datum.fullShapes + 1 : round(datum.exactValue)`).as("totalShapes"),
    vl.calculate(`sequence(0, datum.totalShapes)`).as("positions"),
    vl.flatten(["positions"]),
    vl.calculate(`datum.positions === datum.totalShapes - 1 && datum.decimal >= 0.3 && datum.decimal <= 0.7 ? 1 : 0`).as("isHalfShape"),
    vl.calculate(`datum.isHalfShape === 1 ? datum.name + '_half' : datum.name`).as("shapeKey")
  )
  .width(makeWidth(width))
  .height(height)
  .facet({
    column: {
      field: "Quantile",
      type: "nominal",
      title: null,
      sort: ["Arm", "Reich"],
      header: {
        labelFontSize: showFacetHeader ? 15 : 0,
        labelOrient: "top",
        labelPadding: -6,
      },
    },
    spacing: -60
  })
  .resolve({scale: {x: "shared"}})
  .data(inputData)
  .config(config);

}
```
